name: Todo list
description: A wired todo list — ships with an actionSpec + streamSpec so clicking a checkbox fires the Tasks MCP's tasks_complete tool end-to-end. Use this to validate runtime data-contract enforcement without BYOK.

contract.intent: Manage a simple todo list by creating tasks and toggling completion status.

createTask.label: Create task
createTask.description: Add a new task to the store.

tasks.description: Current task list. Refreshed from tasks_list after every wired action.
